---
title: "Whitepapers"
lang: en
draft: true
listing:
  contents: whitepapers
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
---

In-depth analyses combining open data, statistical modelling, and domain context. Most papers focus on questions where conventional approaches rely on point estimates — and where distributional thinking changes the conclusion.

Each whitepaper is available as an HTML page (with reproducible code) and as a downloadable PDF.

Topics range from regulatory and legal data to public sector analytics, with method emphasis on Bayesian hierarchical models, causal inference, and uncertainty quantification.
